title: Client Data & Analytics Associate (f/m/d)
required_skills: 2+ years experience in data analytics, business intelligence or related field
Familiarity with SQL and modern BI tools
Excellent communication, collaboration and presentation skills
Strong grasp of modern data practices (team structure, tools, ways of working)
Experience working in an agile, product-led context
Strong influencing skills and ability to challenge traditional thinking
matched_skills: 4+ years data analytics / BI experience (exceeds 2-year requirement)
Modern BI tools: Power BI (PL-300), Qlik Sense, Google Looker Studio, SAP Analytics
C-level data storytelling and stakeholder communication
Agile ways of working: Scrum, SAFe (Hapag-Lloyd, cross-functional coordination)
Marketing KPI framework design and data-driven reporting
Cross-functional team coordination and project management
missing_skills: Explicit SQL experience (not listed in CV; BI tools present but SQL not named)
Analytics team leadership or people management
core_responsibilities: Guide clients in redefining reporting and analytics to use Kraken data and concepts via working sessions, trainings, and SQL/BI examples
Coach client data teams on best practices and identify gaps in skills, roles, tools, or process
Help clients identify reporting and analytics outcomes and partner with product to deliver them
Train Kraken's client delivery team on effective data questioning and leveraging data for business impact
recommended_emphasis: Highlight client-facing data advisory or consulting moments (HSBC C-level bridge, ECE insight delivery)
Explicitly name SQL experience if any exists — even basic query writing reduces a key gap
Emphasise agile delivery credentials (Scrum/SAFe) as they directly match the product-led context requirement
Frame KPI framework design and reporting redefinition work as coaching / enablement of stakeholders
Lead with the PL-300 certification to reinforce BI tool credibility upfront
